final:
module RefModule(
    output reg Q,   // Changed to output reg to avoid re-declaration error
    input  CLK,
    input  D,
    input  DE,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND
);// always block that updates Q on the posedge of CLK
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (DE) begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end

endmodule
